name: discord
description: Read messages, send messages, and interact with Discord servers

envVars.name: DISCORD_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Discord OAuth Client ID (from your application)

envVars.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
envVars.description: Discord Bot Token (optional, for advanced bot features)

tools.name: List Guilds
tools.description: List Discord servers (guilds) the user is a member of

tools.name: List Channels
tools.description: List channels in a Discord server

tools.name: Get Messages
tools.description: Get recent messages from a Discord channel

tools.name: Send Message
tools.description: Send a message to a Discord channel

tools.name: Get User
tools.description: Get information about the authenticated Discord user

prompts.title: Check my Discord messages
prompts.prompt: Check my recent Discord messages across all servers and summarize any important updates or mentions.

prompts.title: Send an announcement
prompts.prompt: Send an announcement message to a specific Discord channel.

prompts.title: List my servers
prompts.prompt: Show me all the Discord servers I'm a member of with their details.
